title: canvodpy-extensions: Optional Slot-In Packages for the canVODpy GNSS-Transmissometry Ecosystem
description: canvodpy-extensions is a supplement to canVODpy, hosting optional packages that slot into it but don't belong in its core monorepo: recipe-based filename mapping for non-canonical GNSS receiver output (canvod-filemap), Airflow DAG definitions for canVODpy pipelines (canvod-airflow), and bidirectional data adapters between canVODpy and third-party GNSS-VOD tools (canvod-adapters). Install only what you need.

creators.name: Bader, Nicolas François
creators.affiliation: TU Wien, Department of Geodesy and Geoinformation, Climate and Environmental Remote Sensing CLIMERS Research Unit
